prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response: I'm so sorry to hear that, I can't even begin to imagine what you're going through right now. Please know that I'm here for you, day or night, if you'd like to talk, vent, or just sit in silence together. I'm only a call, text, or message away. Sending you all the love and strength your way during this difficult time.
